mnemonics: Test Components Are VITAL: Validation, Integration, Test Suites, Analysis, Load/Performance
keyPoints: Unit Tests validate individual NLP components (e.g., a tokenizer).
Integration Tests check if multiple components work together (e.g., a full pipeline).
Evaluation Metrics (like Precision, Recall, F1-Score) are used to quantitatively assess system performance.
commonMistakes: Only testing on clean, perfect text inputs and ignoring real-world noisy data.
Using the same data for training and testing, leading to overoptimistic performance (data leakage).
Focusing only on accuracy and ignoring important metrics like computational efficiency and bias/fairness.
